name: Top Customers (Native)
description: Hand-written SQL with a text variable and a field filter.

native.query:
SELECT c.FIRST_NAME || ' ' || c.LAST_NAME AS CUSTOMER, SUM(o.SALES_AMOUNT) AS REVENUE
FROM CSA.TJ.ORDER_FACT o
JOIN CSA.TJ.CUSTOMER_DIM c ON c.CUSTOMER_KEY = o.CUSTOMER_KEY
WHERE c.REGION = {{region}} AND {{order_date}}
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 10
